1. Lancet Respir Med. 2020 Mar;8(3):267-276. doi: 10.1016/S2213-2600(19)30417-5. 
Epub 2020 Feb 7.

Dexamethasone treatment for the acute respiratory distress syndrome: a 
multicentre, randomised controlled trial.
